'uiuxdesign' NONE ('ui/ux' alone dangerously fuzzy-hits linux). Common in VN FE/design hybrid roles. Propose canonical ui_ux_design (design). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]
'android' NONE (kotlin/java exist but native Android platform skill is distinct). Propose canonical android_native (mobile_platform). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]
bare 'iOS' dangerously fuzzy-hits css; 'iosdevelopment' NONE. Swift exists but iOS platform skill is distinct. Propose canonical ios_native (mobile_platform). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]
Today FALSE: unity→'unix'@d2→linux → guard + new canonical unity. [unlocked by step-3 expansion]
'blockchain' NONE. Strong VN web3/crypto hiring. Propose canonical blockchain (blockchain) covering smart-contracts/web3. [unlocked by step-3 expansion]

'promptengineering' NONE. Fast-growing AI skill in VN JDs/student projects. Propose canonical prompt_engineering (ai_ml). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]
DANGER: 'llm' fuzzy-matches java at d=2 (wrong!). LLM/RAG app building is a real emerging VN AI role. Propose canonical llm_engineering (ai_ml). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]

'apachespark' NONE. Big-data processing engine in VN data-engineering roles. Propose canonical spark (data_skill) with 'pyspark' alias. [unlocked by step-3 expansion]

'googlecloudplatform' NONE; bare 'GCP' dangerously fuzzy-hits dotnet. Only AWS has a canonical today. Propose canonical cloud_gcp (cloud). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]
'microsoftazure' NONE. Azure common in VN enterprise/.NET shops; only AWS covered today. Propose canonical cloud_azure (cloud). [unlocked by step-3 expansion]

Deploy platform, not an MVP skill. Today FALSE: vercel→'excel'@d2 → the fuzzy guard must kill this. [unlocked — flipped by EVAL_MENTIONS_FLIP run]

Compound: only Excel is tracked; Word/PowerPoint must NOT match. After comma-split, excel resolves, others stay unmatched. Whole string -> NONE today so needs split. [unlocked — flipped by EVAL_MENTIONS_FLIP run]
